subcodes.first_line: O My leaf! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness! Thou hast ever been, and art still, remembered in the presence of this Wronged One. Render praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک بهائی و عنایتی لازال در ساحت مظلوم مذکور بوده و هستی حمد کن
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @purpose; goal of creation, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for women
